body:
Kelly, Nancy here. If you can get in by Friday evening the 18th, we can do the shepherd's pie together that night, then Saturday can be walking around and easy. Steve is fine either way. Let me know.

Aunt Nancy
snippet: Kelly, Nancy here. If you can get in by Friday evening the 18th, we can do the s
subject: Boston weekend — Friday cooking plan

body:
Kelly, small change. Steve picked up a Friday-night shift at the airport, he cannot get home until late. Let us cook Saturday the 20th together instead, all day. We can start around 10 and eat around 3. This is better anyway. Please plan around Saturday not Friday.

Aunt Nancy
snippet: Kelly, small change. Steve picked up a Friday-night shift at the airport, he can
subject: Re: Boston weekend — actually Saturday

body: Kel, I got the cornbread and the rolls this year — Grandma asked for both since she is short an oven. I can pick up the cornmeal at Stop & Shop the Sunday before. Ryan
snippet: Kel, I got the cornbread and the rolls this year — Grandma asked for both since
subject: Thanksgiving dish assignments

body: Kelly, Ryan just got his November shift board. He is 24-on the Wednesday before Thanksgiving and coming off shift at 7am Thursday. He said he can only do the rolls now, no time for the cornbread. Aunt Laura offered to take the cornbread — she can drop it at Grandma's on her way over from the salon. Just so we are all on the same page. Mom
snippet: Kelly, Ryan just got his November shift board. He is 24-on the Wednesday before
subject: Ryan Thanksgiving update — rolls only

body: Kelly, Grandma dictated her extra guest list to me last Sunday. She quietly added the Fletchers, Ellen Harding, Marge and Bob Callahan, plus Deacon Ridley from Grace — that is 6 more mouths on top of the Nelson side. She always does this. I will make sure Ryan knows to pick up more rolls. Add 6 to the count. Mom
snippet: Kelly, Grandma dictated her extra guest list to me last Sunday. She quietly adde
subject: Grandma's Grace list — Thanksgiving

body: Kelly, Pastor Rob Mitchell called Grandma this evening. Marge and Bob Callahan are driving to their daughter's in Ohio for Thanksgiving after all — they cannot come. So subtract 2 from the Grace additions. New Grace count is 4 not 6. I will tell Ryan the roll count is back down. Please adjust wherever you are tracking headcount. Mom
snippet: Kelly, Pastor Rob Mitchell called Grandma this evening. Marge and Bob Callahan a
subject: Re: Grandma's Grace list — Pastor Rob called

body: Cam, I am starting the gift list absurdly early because I have to for the season not to eat me alive. Planning a small handmade thing for you, probably a candle set or one of those tiny leather notebooks you love. Under $40. Say if you want a different vibe. K
snippet: Cam, I am starting the gift list absurdly early because I have to for the season
subject: Christmas — small thing for you

body: Kel, hard veto on the small thing. My year has been the year of stuff I did not need. Let us do no gifts this season, one long slow dinner instead — Max Downtown, a corner table, we pretend the rest of the season is not happening for three hours. Book any Thursday in December that works for you and I will move things. That is the gift. Camille
snippet: Kel, hard veto on the small thing. My year has been the year of stuff I did not
subject: Re: Christmas — proposing no gifts, one dinner instead

body: Kelly, quick note — I am picking up more Sunday afternoon fares at the airport, so our biweekly call is easier for me at 4pm from now on instead of 2pm. Nancy is doing the shepherd's pie this Sunday. Talk then. Dad
snippet: Kelly, quick note — I am picking up more Sunday afternoon fares at the airport,
subject: Sunday call — moving to 4pm

body: Kelly, I am glad we are doing this. Nancy has the shepherd's pie and the beef stew both on her list, we can pick one or do both across the two days. Whatever you want to eat and however you want to run the days, I am flexible. If you want quiet I get it. If you want to walk around the North End that is fine too. Just tell me. Dad
snippet: Kelly, I am glad we are doing this. Nancy has the shepherd's pie and the beef st
subject: December weekend — looking forward to it

body: Kelly, just so you know, Nancy is right — I ended up on the Friday-night airport shift, so we cannot cook Friday. Saturday works for me all day. Whatever you and Nancy decide about lodging is fine, my place is small. Dad
snippet: Kelly, just so you know, Nancy is right — I ended up on the Friday-night airport
subject: Re: December weekend — Friday shift landed
